resultList.dtldesc: Introducing a thoughtfully designed 2 BHK apartment located in the well developed neighbourhood of Gota, Ahmedabad. Offering a balanced mix of comfort, convenience and reliable construction quality, this ready to move home is ideal for families or buyers seeking a practical residence within a peaceful yet well connected locality. The apartment is situated in a secure residential complex that provides a calm living environment with good access to essential urban facilities.Property SpecificationsPositioned on the fifth floor of an eight storey building, the apartment offers a super built up area of 86 sq. m with an efficient and well structured layout. It features two spacious bedrooms, two bathrooms and one balcony that enhances natural light and airflow throughout the home. The apartment is fully furnished, making it suitable for immediate use without additional setup requirements. A dedicated store room adds to the practicality of the layout, offering extra space for organised storage. The interiors are maintained well and reflect sturdy construction with an age of 10 to 15 years. The property comes with freehold ownership, providing long term security and flexibility for the buyer. The unit overlooks both the garden and the main road, creating a pleasant mix of greenery and openness.FacilitiesResidents benefit from essential amenities that support comfortable daily living. The building is equipped with a lift for convenient access across floors. The environment is secure and well maintained, contributing to an organised residential atmosphere. Water and electricity supply in the area are reliable, ensuring minimal interruptions. The presence of a balcony and good cross ventilation further enhances the everyday living experience within the home.LocalityLocated in Gota, one of the fast developing residential pockets of Ahmedabad, the property enjoys strong connectivity to key conveniences. The area offers easy access to schools, hospitals, markets and public transport services. Apollo International School is a notable nearby landmark, making the location suitable for families with educational needs. The neighbourhood is well connected to major roads and offers seamless commuting options to other parts of the city. With a blend of accessibility, peaceful surroundings and urban facilities, Gota remains a preferred choice for homebuyers seeking both comfort and practicality.
